cloudrift.title: CloudRift — Sovereign AI Platform for Enterprise Deployments
cloudrift.description: CloudRift is the sovereign AI platform for enterprise GPU infrastructure. Run LLM inference and AI workloads on-premise or within your security perimeter — full virtualization, full data sovereignty.

deepinfra.title: deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3-0324 - Demo - DeepInfra
deepinfra.description: DeepSeek-V3-0324, a strong Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model with 671B total parameters with 37B activated for each token, an improved iteration over DeepSeek-V3.. Try out API on the Web

fireworks.title: Fireworks - Pricing
fireworks.description: Choose the plan thats right for you.

groq.title: Groq On-Demand Pricing for Tokens-as-a-Service | Groq is fast, low cost inference.
groq.description: Groq powers leading openly-available AI models. View the pricing of our core models including GPT-OSS, Kimi K2, Qwen3 32B, and more.

cloudrift_ai.title: GPU Infrastructure Pricing • On-Demand & Reserved Compute | CloudRift
cloudrift_ai.description: Transparent GPU infrastructure pricing for datacenter operators and enterprises. On-demand and reserved capacity across RTX 4090, RTX 5090, RTX PRO 6000, L40, and more. Calculate costs for sovereign AI deployments.
